---
title: "test_ui_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_ui_empire.py"
loc: 49
complexity: 3
logic_score: 3.80
style_score: 3.87
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.29
---

## Intent
The `test_ui_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestUIEmpire, setup_method, test_ensure_persona, test_progress_bar, test_sparkline, test_box_rendering, test_log_rejection. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestUIEmpire, setup_method, test_ensure_persona, test_progress_bar, test_sparkline, test_box_rendering, test_log_rejection. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 16 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `TestUIEmpire`
- `setup_method`
- `test_ensure_persona`
- `test_progress_bar`
- `test_sparkline`
- `test_box_rendering`
- `test_log_rejection`
